description_long: This house is a single-story residential building set on a rectangular plot, surrounded by lush landscaping including tall coniferous trees and leafy shrubs. The structure features a combination of flat and low-pitched roofs, with a mix of white and reddish-brown exterior walls, likely brick and stucco. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front entryway is marked by a small porch with steps leading up to the main door, partially sheltered by an overhang. The property includes a paved driveway and walkways, with green lawns and dense plantings creating a sense of privacy. The overall design is modern with hints of mid-century ranch style, emphasizing horizontal lines and integration with the landscape.
description: A modern, single-story house with flat and low-pitched roofs, surrounded by dense trees and shrubs, featuring white and reddish-brown walls and large, asymmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, and dense landscaping with tall trees and shrubs framing the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the flat and low-pitched rooflines, and the extensive greenery along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and a continuation of the landscaped garden and trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing more of the house's brickwork, window arrangement, and the paved driveway leading to the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with small porch, steps, and overhang, partially framed by landscaping
